narrative:
Cols 19-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 940 registered voters, with 44.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 41.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 26.9 percentage points.
